    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    CachedBodyRequestWrapper
    HttpServletRequestWrapper that caches the request body so it can be read multiple times (once by the logging filter, once by the actual handler).
    CachedBodyResponseWrapper
    HttpServletResponseWrapper that captures the response body so it can be included in the HTTP log entry.
    HttpLoggingFilter
    Logs all inbound HTTP requests and their responses as structured entries.
    SigNozAuditAutoConfiguration
    Audit logging auto-configuration for Spring Boot 3.x.
    SigNozAutoConfiguration
    Root auto-configuration entry point for the SigNoz Spring Boot 3.x starter.
    SigNozLoggingAutoConfiguration
    Logging auto-configuration for Spring Boot 3.x.
    SigNozMetricsAutoConfiguration
    Metrics auto-configuration for Spring Boot 3.x.
    SigNozTracingAutoConfiguration
    Tracing auto-configuration for Spring Boot 3.x.
    SigNozWebAutoConfiguration
    Web auto-configuration for Spring Boot 3.x (jakarta.servlet).
    TraceIdMdcFilter
    Servlet filter that extracts the active OpenTelemetry trace/span IDs and injects them into the SLF4J MDC for the duration of each HTTP request.
